text: Standing before the glowing chamber labeled R+D, I feel a sense of anticipation, as though stepping into a laboratory of future ideas. The bluish light casts an otherworldly tinge on my thoughts, inviting a sense of curiosity mixed with mild unease—what boundaries separate observer from experiment? The creative energy in the space feels electric, yet I am also aware of my own solitude, like a witness on the cusp of discovery, uncertain what I might find on the other side of the glass.
